name: Pumpkin Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the butter and cream cheese with an electric mixer until well blended. Stir in flour.
2. Divide dough into 24 balls, each about 2 inches in diameter. Press the dough evenly into the bottom and up the sides of 24 muffin cups (1-3/4 inches tall).
3. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
4. Combine brown sugar, pumpkin, egg yolk, half-and-half or milk, melted butter, rum, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a bowl.
5. Spoon the mixture into the prebaked muffin cups. Stir together nuts, remaining brown sugar, and melted butter; sprinkle over the pumpkin mixture.
6. Bake at 325°F for an additional 25 minutes.
7. Cool in pans for 10 minutes. Loosen and remove muffins from pans. Serve warm or cool.
